corn_2012.narrative: Worst Midwest drought since 1988. National yield fell to 123 bu/acre.

corn_2019.narrative: Historic planting delays from spring flooding. 20M acres went unplanted.

soybeans_2012.wasdeSurprise: USDA slashed soy production estimate 12% in August
soybeans_2012.narrative: Midwest drought hit soybeans during pod fill. National yield fell to 40 bu/acre.

wheat_2002.narrative: Widespread drought across the Great Plains winter wheat belt.

corn_2005.narrative: Midwest drought stress during pollination reduced yields below trend.

soybeans_2003.narrative: Hot, dry August across the Midwest during pod fill.
